action.reasoning: Observation: 30 epochs/task full-replay achieved 0.7449 test accuracy, up from 0.7147. Analysis: The sequential training with full replay but no final joint training leaves room for improvement. By adding a final phase that trains on all accumulated data jointly (like multi-class fine-tuning), we can approach the upper bound of ResNet-18 on CIFAR-100 (~0.80+). Decision: Reduce per-task epochs to 5 (save time) and add 150 epochs of joint training on the entire buffer with cosine annealing from a lower learning rate. Save best checkpoint based on validation accuracy during joint phase. Submit eval (~45 min expected).
